docs.title: PEAR Lab
docs.text: Perception, Edge AI, and Robotics Laboratory

docs.title: 感知、邊緣人工智慧與機器人實驗室
docs.text: The advisor provides time for exploration and growth, but research progress is ultimately your own responsibility. 指導老師願意給予學生時間探索與成長，但研究進度終究是自己的責任。

docs.title: English Version
docs.text: This website serves as the central hub for lab operations, including policies, technical resources, and administrative workflows. Please review all materials carefully and integrate them into your research practice.

docs.title: 1. Professionalism & Rigor
docs.text: We expect all members to develop strong technical skills and maintain rigorous academic standards. Our goal is not short-term results, but the development of sustainable and transferable expertise in AI.

docs.title: 2. Research Integrity
docs.text:
All research must adhere to the following principles:

  • Reliability: Data must be accurate and truthful
  • Reproducibility: Experiments must be verifiable and repeatable
  • Critical Thinking: Do not rely on unverified AI-generated outputs

docs.title: 3. Initiative & Responsibility
docs.text:
Research progress is the responsibility of each individual. Members are expected to take initiative in their work.

Expected behaviors:

  1. Read relevant literature
  2. Implement and validate methods
  3. Identify problems and propose solutions

docs.title: 4. Resource & Environment
docs.text:
• Maintain a clean working environment
  • Use equipment properly
  • Avoid misuse or unnecessary resource consumption

Maintain a safe and sustainable research environment for all members.

docs.title: 5. Respect & Accountability
docs.text:
Mutual respect and accountability are fundamental to a professional research environment.

  • Maintain respectful communication with advisors and lab members
  • Respond to messages and meeting requests in a timely manner
  • Do not become unresponsive or unavailable without prior notice
  • Take responsibility for your commitments and deadlines

docs.title: 中文版本
docs.text: 這裡是實驗室的運作中心，存放所有規範、技術資源與行政流程。 請每位成員務必詳閱，並將其內化為研究生活的一部分。

docs.title: 1. 專業能力與嚴謹態度
docs.text: 本實驗室期望每位成員培養紮實的專業能力與嚴謹的學術態度，強調可持續累積且可轉移的核心能力。

docs.title: 2. 學術誠信與研究品質
docs.text:
• 真實可靠：實驗數據須真實
  • 可驗證性：研究過程須可重現
  • 批判思考：不得盲信未驗證之 AI 結果

docs.title: 3. 自主學習與責任
docs.text:
建議基本行為：

  1. 主動閱讀文獻
  2. 實作與驗證方法
  3. 整理問題並提出解法

docs.title: 4. 資源維護與實驗室環境
docs.text:
• 維持環境整潔
  • 正確使用設備
  • 避免不當使用或資源浪費

共同維護安全且可持續的研究環境。

docs.title: 5. 尊重與守信
docs.text:
良好的研究環境建立於彼此尊重與基本的責任感之上。

  • 與指導教授及實驗室成員保持基本禮貌與尊重
  • 應適時回覆訊息與會議安排
  • 不得無故失聯或長時間未回應
  • 對自身承諾之工作與時程負責

docs.title: English Version
docs.text:
This lab requires all students to complete both academic and internal requirements before graduation.

Failure to meet these requirements may result in delayed approval of graduation.

docs.title: Requirements
docs.text:
1. Department Requirements

  2. Complete all coursework and meet official graduation criteria

  3. Research Contribution

  4. Expected to participate in at least one publication (journal or conference)

  5. Must demonstrate substantial contribution

  6. Thesis

  7. Pass the oral defense
  8. Complete all required revisions
  9. Subject to advisor approval

docs.title: Lab Handover (Core Requirement)
docs.text:
To ensure research continuity and reproducibility, the following must be completed:

  • Code must be properly organized and uploaded to the designated repository
  • Documentation (README) must include environment setup, execution instructions, and dataset information
  • All related materials (thesis files, slides, experimental results) must be archived
  • The successor must be able to reproduce results independently

docs.title: Handover Criteria
docs.text:
A handover is considered complete only if:

  • Code can be executed in a new environment
  • Results are reproducible without additional explanation
  • All materials are properly organized and archived

docs.title: Notes
docs.text:
• Graduation requirements must be completed in sequence
  • Students are expected to allocate sufficient time (1–2 weeks) for final organization and handover
  • All research outputs must maintain reproducibility and integrity

For detailed procedures, refer to: https://ewz9.github.io/lab_handbook/workflow/

docs.title: Handover Criteria
docs.text:
A handover is considered complete only if:

  • Code can be executed in a new environment
  • Results are reproducible without additional explanation
  • All materials are properly archived

docs.title: 中文版本
docs.text: 本實驗室畢業流程除須符合系所與學校規定外，亦須完成實驗室之研究與交接要求。

docs.title: 畢業標準檢核表
docs.text: 重要提醒 指導教授將依此清單核對進度。若未完成實驗室規範，指導教授有權暫緩相關簽核流程。

docs.title: 1. 基礎規定與學術發表
docs.text:
• [ ] 滿足系所規定：修課學分、成績達標及符合修業年限。
  • [ ] 完成研究發表：至少參與並協助完成一篇期刊或研討會論文，且須具備實質貢獻。
  • [ ] 通過論文口試：依口試委員意見完成論文修改與最終定稿。

docs.title: 2. 實驗室研究交接（核心要求）
docs.text:
為了確保研究成果的可重現性，必須完成以下事項：

  • [ ] 程式碼整理
  • [ ] 文件化（README）
  • [ ] 資料歸檔
  • [ ] 操作示範

docs.title: 交接完成判定標準
docs.text:
成功交接的定義 未達以下標準者，視為未完成交接：
  1. 可執行性
  2. 可復現性
  3. 完整性

docs.title: 補充說明
docs.text:
• 循序漸進：請預留至少 1–2 週進行資料整理。
  • 研究誠信：所有數據須確保可重現性。
  • 詳細操作：請參閱此處

docs.title: Principal Investigator
docs.text:
Shao-Kang Huang 黃紹綱

Assistant Professor Department of Artificial Intelligence Tamkang University

Email: 169394@o365.tku.edu.tw Phone: #55654 Office: E722

docs.title: Lab Management & Conduct Policy 實驗室管理與使用規範
English Version
docs.text: Core Values: Research Integrity, Initiative, Mutual Respect This lab aims to maintain a productive research environment. All members are required to comply with the following policies. Web version: https://ewz9.github.io/lab_handbook/

docs.title: I. Laboratory Assets
docs.text:
• Equipment is for academic use only.
  • Unauthorized borrowing, transfer, or rental is prohibited.
  • Do not remove equipment from campus without approval.
  • Report any damage immediately.
  • Damage caused by negligence is subject to university regulations.

docs.title: II. Laboratory Usage
docs.text:
• The last person leaving must lock the door.
  • Before weekends or emergencies, ensure lights and equipment are turned off.
  • Staying in the lab beyond 10:00 PM is prohibited.
  • Keep the environment clean and restore shared spaces after use.
  • Visitors are not allowed without permission.

docs.title: Meetings
docs.text:
• Members must meet with the advisor at least once every two weeks.
  • Reports should include progress, problems, attempted solutions, and next steps.

docs.title: Attendance
docs.text:
• Members are expected to work during regular hours unless approved.
  • Long-term absence or lack of communication is not allowed.

docs.title: Data Management
docs.text:
• Accounts must not be shared.
  • Data must be backed up (cloud + local).
  • All materials must be organized before departure.

docs.title: AI Usage
docs.text:
• AI-generated content must be verified.
  • Direct submission of AI-generated outputs is prohibited.

docs.title: IV. Violations
docs.text:
• First violation: warning
  • Repeated violations: restricted access or administrative report
  • Severe cases: removal from the lab

docs.title: Member Agreement
docs.text:
New members must acknowledge this policy via: Issue

Statement:

"I, [Name], have read and agree to comply with all lab policies. Date: YYYY/MM/DD"

docs.title: 中文版本
docs.text:
核心價值：研究誠信、主動學習、彼此尊重

本實驗室旨在維持良好的研究環境與基本運作秩序，每位成員均須遵守以下規範。 網頁版: https://ewz9.github.io/lab_handbook/

docs.title: Ⅰ. 實驗室財產管理
docs.text:
所有設備與資源皆屬校方財產，旨在支持學術研究。

  • 嚴禁私用：設備不得用於非學術用途（例如：加密貨幣挖礦、私人營利等），亦不得私自借用、轉讓或租賃。
  • 財產盤點：校方每年進行盤點與不定期查核，設備未經許可不得擅自帶離校內。
  • 故障通報：設備發生故障或損壞，應立即透過 Teams 或 Email 通知指導教授，切勿自行處理或隱匿不報。
  • 責任歸屬：因個人疏失導致設備損毀者，須依校方規定負擔相應賠償責任。

docs.title: Ⅱ. 實驗室空間使用規範
docs.text:
維護安全與整潔是每位成員的共同責任。

  • 門禁與安全：
    • 進出應隨手關門，最後離開者須負責鎖門。
    • 最後離開、假日、颱風前務必確認：關閉電燈冷氣、關閉門窗、確保電源安全。
  • 時間限制：
    • 嚴禁留宿：學生不得滯留實驗室超過 晚上 10:00。
  • 環境維護：
    • 個人垃圾須當日清除，不得堆積。
    • 公共空間（桌面、白板、設備區）使用後須恢復原狀。
  • 訪客限制：未經允許，不得攜帶非成員長時間使用實驗室空間或設備。

docs.title: Ⅲ. 研究生學術與出席規範
docs.text:
研究不僅是技術產出，更包含職業道德與團隊互動。

  1. 進度會議 (Meeting)：
    • 每兩週至少與指導教授進行一次進度會議。
    • 報告內容：研究進度、當前問題、嘗試過的解法、下一步規劃。
  2. 出席要求：
    • 原則上於正常上班時間在實驗室研究。
    • 特殊需求（遠端、彈性工時）須事先討論並取得同意，且不得影響研究品質。
    • 嚴禁長期未回報或失聯。
  3. 資料管理：
    • 帳號不得共用。
    • 研究資料須定期執行雙重備份（雲端與硬碟）。
    • 畢業或離職前，須完成資料夾整理並完整交接原始碼與文件。
  4. AI 工具使用：
    • 凡利用 AI 產出之參考文獻、數據、算式，必須逐一人工驗證。
    • 不得將 AI 生成內容直接作為最終成果提交。

docs.title: Ⅳ. 違規處理機制
docs.text:
• 初次違反：進行口頭或書面警告。
  • 多次或情節重大：限制實驗室資源使用權，並通報系所行政單位。
  • 拒不改善：要求退出實驗室並移送相關行政議處。

docs.title: 成員簽署
docs.text:
請新進成員於此Repository的Issues分頁的"[簽署] 實驗室規範確認 (Member Agreement)"下方留言，內容註明「本人 [姓名] 已詳閱並同意本實驗室手冊之所有規範。日期：2026/04/22」以完成數位簽署。

附則 * 本規範自公布日起實施，修正時亦同。 * 如有未盡事宜，悉依校方相關規定辦理。

Last Updated: 2026-04-22

docs.title: Research 研究方向
docs.text:
Our lab focuses on applying artificial intelligence to real-world environments, particularly integrating perception, edge computing, and intelligent systems to develop deployable AI technologies.

本實驗室專注於人工智慧在實際環境中的應用，特別是結合感知、邊緣運算與智慧系統，致力於打造可部署於真實世界的 AI 技術。

docs.title: Edge AI 邊緣運算
docs.text:
We study how to deploy deep learning models on resource-constrained edge devices, including model compression, efficient inference, and system optimization.

研究如何將深度學習模型部署於資源受限的邊緣裝置，包含模型壓縮、加速推論與系統優化。

docs.title: Object Pose Estimation 物件姿態估測
docs.text:
We focus on estimating the 3D position and orientation of objects, with applications in robotic manipulation and scene understanding. Future work includes integration with robotic arms.

專注於物件在三維空間中的位置與姿態估測，應用於機器人操作與場景理解，未來將結合機器手臂實作。

docs.title: Anomaly Detection 異常事件偵測
docs.text:
We investigate anomaly detection methods for applications such as industrial inspection, surveillance systems, and smart manufacturing.

研究異常事件偵測方法，應用於工業檢測、監控系統與智慧製造。

docs.title: Machine Perception 機器感知
docs.text:
We explore how machines interpret visual and sensory data, including visual understanding, representation learning, and multimodal perception.

探討機器如何理解視覺與感測資料，包含影像理解、特徵學習與跨模態感知。

docs.title: Prerequisites & Learning Resources
docs.text:
[English Version]

[!IMPORTANT] The following resources include internal lab materials. Do not redistribute or share externally.

To ensure smooth research progress, new members are expected to acquire the following core skills during the early stage:

Internal Lab Materials – Do Not Distribute

These resources form the foundation of our lab research. Please study them carefully.

  • Fundamental Programming & AI Skills

    • Includes Python environment setup, Git version control, and basic deep learning frameworks.

  • Object Pose Estimation Basics

    • A core technique in robotic perception, enabling object grasping when integrated with motion planning. It is a key component of Physical AI.

  • Anomaly Detection Basics

    • Commonly applied in industrial inspection, surveillance, data analysis, and IoT applications.

docs.title: 先備知識與學習資源
docs.text:
[!IMPORTANT] 以下資源包含實驗室內部資料，請勿任意外流與轉載。

為確保研究進度順利，建議成員於入學初期掌握以下核心技能：

實驗室內部資料，請勿任意外流與轉載

以下資源為本實驗室研究之核心基礎，請妥善學習。

  • 基礎電腦程式與 AI 相關技能

    • 包含 Python 環境管理、Git 版本控制與基礎 Deep Learning 架構。

  • 基礎物件姿態估測

    • 屬於機器人感知核心技術，能配合手臂路徑規劃實現機器人物件夾取，是 Physical AI 關鍵技術之一。

  • 基礎異常偵測系統

    • 常見於公司管理、工業檢測、視覺數據分析以及物聯網等應用領域。

docs.title: English Version
docs.text: This page summarizes common administrative procedures in the lab (e.g., inventory, travel reimbursement, purchasing, scholarships, exchange programs). For any unclear cases, please consult the department office or the advisor.

docs.title: 💰 Reimbursement Guidelines
docs.text:
All reimbursement requests must:

  • Confirm in advance whether a tax ID is required, how the receipt should be issued, and obtain advisor approval
  • Keep original receipts or invoices and follow the university reimbursement deadline

docs.title: Purchase Reimbursement (Supplies / Equipment)
docs.text:
1. Approval Inform the advisor via communication tools before purchase and confirm budget and necessity

  2. Receipt Ensure the university tax ID is included: [Fill in here] Print electronic invoices if necessary

  3. System Submission Submit details in the university reimbursement system, including funding source and purpose

  4. Submission Organize documents and submit to the department office

docs.title: Travel Reimbursement (Conference / Paper Presentation)
docs.text:
• Pre-application: Must be submitted at least one week in advance
  • Transportation: Keep tickets (e.g., HSR or electronic proof)
  • Registration Fee: Keep official receipt

docs.title: 📑 Graduate Administrative Notes
docs.text:
Inventory Check (Annual)
  • Each student is responsible for equipment at their desk
  • Borrowed items must be returned during inspection
Scholarship Application
  • Regularly check department announcements
  • If recommendation letters are required, send CV and draft at least two weeks in advance
Internship / Exchange / Overseas Study
  • Discuss research continuity with the advisor in advance
  • Complete lab handover if approved
Lab Exit Handover
  • Organize code and create a GitHub repository including README, environment setup (Docker, Anaconda), dataset links, and execution instructions
  • Coordinate with the successor and ensure they can run the system independently
  • Once confirmed, both parties (including advisor) should complete repository fork
  • Return all lab equipment
  • Submit research materials following the template: 👉 https://github.com/Ewz9/lab_handbook/tree/main/template

docs.title: 中文版本
docs.text: 本頁面記錄實驗室成員常遇到的行政流程(例如：盤點、出差報帳、購物報帳、獎學金申請、交換生申請等)。 若有未盡事宜，請詢問系辦助理或指導教授。

docs.title: 💰 報帳作業規範
docs.text: 所有的報帳申請請務必: 諮詢事前確認是否需要填寫統一編號、二/三聯式發票抬頭怎麼寫、已獲指導教授許可 保留原始發票或收據，並注意學校核銷期限。

docs.title: 購物報帳 (耗材、設備)
docs.text:
1. 步驟一：取得許可 採購前須先於通訊軟體內盡速告知教授，確認預算來源與必要性。
  2. 步驟二：索取憑證 購買時務必打上學校統編：[在此填寫學校統編]。若為電子發票，請列印紙本。
  3. 步驟三：填寫系統 登入學校核銷系統，填寫經費來源、用途說明，並貼上憑證。
  4. 步驟四：送件 將核銷單據夾好後，送交至系辦公室。

docs.title: 出差報帳 (研討會、論文發表)
docs.text:
• 事前申請：出差前一週須完成校內差假申請。
  • 交通憑證：搭乘高鐵須保留票根（或電子票證明）。
  • 報名費：請保留研討會收據正本。

docs.title: 📑 研究生行政事務紀錄
docs.text:
財產盤點 (每年定期執行)
  • 每位研究生須負責保管自己座位上的設備。
  • 盤點期間，所有外借設備（如筆電）須帶回實驗室待查。
獎學金申請
  • 定期關注系所公告之「研究生助學金」或「企業獎學金」。
  • 需要推薦信者，請於截止日前兩週將「個人簡歷」與「申請表草案」寄給教授，並以通訊軟體通知。
企業研習、交換生與海外研習規劃
  • 申請前盡早與教授約時間深入討論研究進度的延續性。
  • 獲准後須完成實驗室業務交接手續。
實驗室離開前業務交接
  • 請整理研究的程式並建構Github repository，包含:Readme、環境安裝與規格(如Docker, Anaconda)、資料集連結、程式執行和產物。
  • 請聯繫教師或其所指派備承接的成員，並請他在你的Github和指導下實際在一台電腦上操作。
  • 當接手者確認可獨立操作，請聯繫教師並讓雙方（含指導教授）完成 Repository Fork。
  • 請歸還實驗室設備，交與實驗室設備管理者或教師本人。
  • 請依照此處資料夾內格式整理研究相關檔案(e.g.研究論文、報告投影片等)後交給教師。
